Name: DAMAGE_LEVEL_CONV_PARAM_ST
Description:
Determines the damage level after each conversion threshold is exceeded.
This is linked to Attitude Stability.

Fields.Name: Damage Level after Threshold 0 is Exceeded
Fields.Description: Damage level when previous impact damage threshold is exceeded

Fields.Description: Damage level when previous impact damage threshold is exceeded
